principle: Text about yourself is not about you — it's about your utility; reader has 50 tabs open, not a romantic dinner with you
explanation: X.copy|about_you_paradox: reader_wants_to_hire/order/partner -> they_seek_function_not_soul; your_creative_path+feelings == interesting_only_to_family; match_readers_request_fast; NO:imagining_reader_on_date_with_full_attention; recruiter_has_50_candidates; once_utility_proven -> then_personality_matters eg: "my_creative_journey_began" >> "I_make_websites_for_small_business._Ready_in_a_week._Examples:"

principle: Drama, origin stories, fan letters, forced creativity in job applications — each feels like advantage but repels employers
explanation: X.copy|application_traps: drama (hard_life+last_chance) -> employer_sees_risk; origin ("since_school_I_dreamed") -> nobody_cares_about_childhood; fan_letters ("I_love_your_company") -> bosses_know_fans_have_inflated_expectations; forced_creativity (poems+unusual_tone) -> recruiter_has_no_time; NO:all_four; calm_factual_response_to_requirements eg: "tragic_backstory+lifelong_dream+your_biggest_fan+poem" >> "I_did_X_at_Y._Proof:_link._Gap:_Z._Ready_to_learn"

principle: Don't project your wounds onto new readers — aggressive disclaimers about past bad clients lecture innocent people
explanation: X.copy|wound_projection: designer_burned_by_"need_it_yesterday" -> puts_angry_disclaimer_on_site; reader_who_hasnt_done_anything -> gets_lectured_at_first_meeting; your_past_pain != readers_question; NO:preemptive_aggression_from_bad_experiences; address_real_reader_questions_not_your_trauma eg: "I_dont_work_with_rush_orders_dont_even_ask" >> "typical_timeline:_one_week._For_faster_options_lets_discuss"
